items.body:
All dependency changes look good. The new `@azure/postgresql-auth` package correctly uses semver caret ranges for published runtime dependencies (`@azure/core-auth ^1.9.0`, `@azure/logger ^1.2.0`, `tslib ^2.8.1`), `workspace:^` for all internal dev tools (`@azure/dev-tool`, `@azure/eslint-plugin-azure-sdk`, `@azure-tools/test-utils-vitest`), and proper `catalog:` / `catalog:testing` / `catalog:internal` references for all shared devDependencies. Peer dependencies (`pg >=8.0.0`, `sequelize >=6.0.0`) correctly use `>=` ranges and are marked optional. The sample `package.json` files follow the standard pattern with `"next"` and `"latest"` tags. No circular dependencies, no dev/runtime boundary violations, and Node 20+ engine requirement matches the monorepo minimum.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>


</details>
